case_title: ERIC WHITEHEAD VS. RAYMOND F. BOURIS, INC.
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MATTHEW BOURHIS IN SUPPORT OF (1) OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM, MOTION TO REDUCE ARBITRATION AWARD TO JUDGMENT AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES, COSTS AND EXPENSES AND (2) CROSS-MOTION TO PARTIALLY VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 100080110) FILED BY RESPONDENT RAYMOND F. BOURIS, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ERIC WHITEHEAD'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION, MOTION TO REDUCE ARBIRATION AWARD TO JUDGMENT AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES, COSTS, AND EXPENSES IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 27, 2019. RAYMOND F. BOURHIS INC. MAY FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF ON OR BEFORE SEPTEMBER 13 OF UP TO 10 PAGES THAT ADDRESSES THE ARBITRATOR'S RULINGS ON ATTORNEY FEES, WAITING TIME PENALTIES AND COSTS. ERIC WHITEHEAD MAY FILE A 10-PAGE BRIEF ON THOSE SAME TOPICS ON OR BEFORE SEPTEMBER 20. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A. TORREANO, CSR#8600, E-MAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration, Motion To Reduce Arbiration Award To Judgment And Motion For Attorneys' Fees, Costs, And Expenses
Off Calendar Nov-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ERIC WHITEHEAD'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION, MOTION TO REDUCE ARBIRATION AWARD TO JUDGMENT AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES, COSTS, AND EXPENSES.

Appearances: James M. Wagstaffe of Wagstaffe von Loewenfeldt Busch & Radwick LLP (415.357.8900) for petitioner and moving party; David Horton (510.332.3547) of the Bourhis Law Group for responding and opposing party.

The Court provides counsel with a written tentative ruling and passes the matter for counsel to review. On recall, counsel present arguments. The Court takes the matter under submission. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (Tel: 415.516.8416, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration, Motion To Reduce Arbiration Award To Judgment And Motion For Attorneys' Fees, Costs, And Expenses
Off Calendar Sep-19-2019 Continued To Nov-08-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration, Motion To Reduce Arbiration Award To Judgment And Motion For Attorneys' Fees, Costs, And Expenses
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Continued To Oct-18-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration, Motion To Reduce Arbiration Award To Judgment And Motion For Attorneys' Fees, Costs, And Expenses
Off Calendar Sep-06-2019 Continued To Sep-27-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Petitioner Eric Whitehead's Motion To Confirm Arbitration, Motion To Reduce Arbiration Award To Judgment And Motion For Attorneys' Fees, Costs, And Expenses.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The arbitrator only recently issued his final award, complete with rulings on attorney fees, waiting time penalties and costs. Not considering all post-arbitration issues at once would be inefficient. Thus, hearing on all pending motions is continued to September 27, 2019. Raymond F. Bourhis Inc. may, if it desires, file a supplemental brief on or before September 13 of up to 10 pages that addresses the arbitrator's rulings on attorney fees, waiting time penalties and costs. Eric Whitehead may file a 10-page brief on those same topics on or before September 20.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration, Motion To Reduce Arbiration Award To Judgment And Motion For Attorneys' Fees, Costs, And Expenses
Off Calendar Aug-29-2019 Continued To Sep-06-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER ERIC WHITEHEAD'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration, Motion To Reduce Arbiration Award To Judgment And Motion For Attorneys' Fees, Costs, And Expenses.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER ERIC WHITEHEAD's Motion To Confirm Arbitration, Motion To Reduce Arbiration Award To Judgment And Motion For Attorneys' Fees, Costs, And Expenses is continued to September 6, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion, per agreement of parties.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)
